Title: The Cortisol Awakening Response (CAR) Explained
Description: Optimize your morning by understanding the Cortisol Awakening Response! Your cortisol naturally spikes 30-45 minutes after waking up. Getting early sunlight and delaying your caffeine intake by 90 minutes can drastically improve your daily energy levels.
Keywords: cortisol awakening response, morning routine, morning sunlight, sleep health, energy levels, cortisol balance, wellness tips

Title: Cortisol vs. Caffeine: The 90-Minute Rule
Description: Stop drinking coffee immediately after waking up! Wait 90 minutes to allow your natural cortisol spike to clear out adenosine (the sleepy chemical). This simple hack prevents afternoon crashes and provides sustained energy throughout your day.
Keywords: coffee habits, caffeine crash, 90 minute rule, cortisol, afternoon fatigue, morning routine, energy hack

Title: How Cortisol Drives Belly Fat Storage
Description: Did you know chronic stress can change where your body stores fat? High cortisol levels specifically drive visceral fat accumulation around the midsection and increase insulin resistance. Managing stress is critical for a healthy metabolism.
Keywords: cortisol, belly fat, stress management, visceral fat, metabolism, weight loss tips, healthy hormones

Title: Cortisol Detox: 4 Evening Habits to Lower Stress
Description: Lower your cortisol before bed with these 4 detox habits! Dim your lights, supplement with magnesium glycinate, read fiction to disconnect from work, and do a brain-dump journal to clear your mind. Perfect for deep, restorative sleep.
Keywords: evening routine, lower cortisol, stress detox, sleep hacks, magnesium glycinate, healthy habits, relaxation

Title: The Cortisol-Sugar Rollercoaster
Description: Are you on the cortisol-sugar rollercoaster? Stress triggers sugar cravings for quick energy. Eating sugar spikes your insulin, which leads to a blood sugar crash, causing even MORE stress and fatigue. Break the cycle by focusing on protein and healthy fats.
Keywords: sugar cravings, cortisol, blood sugar balance, insulin resistance, stress eating, energy crash, nutrition tips

Title: The 40-Gram Protein Snack Hack: Cottage Cheese Bowls
Description: Hit your macros instantly with the 40-Gram Protein Snack Hack! Combine 1 cup of cottage cheese (25g), 2 tbsp of pumpkin seeds (5g), and a scoop of unflavored collagen (10g) for a delicious, savory bowl that keeps you full for hours.
Keywords: cottage cheese bowl, high protein snack, macro tracking, protein hack, healthy eating, muscle gain, fitness nutrition

Title: High-Protein Travel Snacks (TSA Approved)
Description: Traveling doesn't mean you have to abandon your protein goals! Pack these TSA-approved high-protein snacks: beef jerky, whey protein packets, dry roasted chickpeas, and protein bars. Stay fueled and healthy on the go.
Keywords: travel snacks, high protein travel, tsa approved snacks, healthy travel, protein on the go, fitness lifestyle, healthy eating
